suites.title: academic year transition → student promotion → data migration

specs.title: validates that from-year and to-year must differ
completes full promotion wizard: class mappings → review → execute → verify data migration
rolls back promotion and verifies student records are restored
new academic year creation copies class structure with correct data
performance dashboard shows class average, pass percentage, topper info
subject-wise breakdown with average, highest, lowest per subject
bar and pie charts render for subject comparison and grade distribution
filter performance by exam type (unit test, midterm, final)
student-wise performance shows individual exam history with trend
report cards endpoint returns student list with marks, grade, rank
generate report cards creates PDF-ready data
download individual report card as PDF
bulk download all report cards for class
CBSE report card template supports CCE grading format (scholastic & co-scholastic)
report card includes attendance data and teacher remarks
grade auto-computed from percentage using school grade scale
rank calculated correctly with tie handling
performance comparison across multiple exams
page loads with chat interface and empty message area
pre-built prompt suggestions are displayed before first message
clicking a suggestion fills the input
typing a message and sending shows user message in chat
AI response appears after loading state
model selector dropdown shows available models
copy AI response button copies text to clipboard
loading state shows during AI response generation
feature flag gating shows UpgradePrompt when aiAssistant is disabled
error handling when AI service fails shows friendly error message
displays 4 KPI stat cards with correct totals
date preset selector changes active filter and triggers refetch
attendance section shows average and weekly trend chart
attendance trends chart displays weekday data points
student distribution pie chart shows status breakdown
fee collection bar chart shows paid, pending, overdue
clicking a pie chart slice opens drill-down panel
renders gracefully when API returns zero data
shows loading state while attendance data is being fetched
changing date filter updates charts simultaneously
shows graceful message when attendance API fails
analytics data reflects current academic year from settings
attendance page loads with class selector
selecting a class loads the student list for attendance
previously marked attendance shows saved status
empty class shows appropriate message
attendance statistics are displayed
class attendance history can be viewed
student-level attendance detail accessible
multiple classes have independent attendance
attendance report view shows summary
login with valid credentials redirects to dashboard
login with invalid credentials shows error
login with empty fields prevents submission
password visibility toggle works
session restore from storage on page reload
authenticated user accessing /login redirects to dashboard
2FA flow: login prompts for code then grants access
2FA with invalid code shows error
expired token triggers redirect to login
signup link is visible on login page
1 — calendar page loads with month view showing current month
2 — navigation arrows switch to previous/next month
3 — week view and day view toggle buttons work
4 — events appear on correct date cells with type-based color coding
5 — clicking a date cell opens Create Event drawer
6 — Create Event form has fields: type, title, date/time
7 — creating event adds it to the calendar grid
8 — clicking an existing event shows event detail modal
9 — edit event updates the event and re-renders
10 — delete event shows confirmation and removes from calendar
11 — filter by event type shows different visual styles
12 — empty day cells show no events indicator
timetable page loads with class selector and week grid
selecting a class loads the timetable slots
each slot shows subject and teacher name
clicking an empty slot opens assignment modal
validation dashboard shows conflicts and warnings via API
timetable cleanup preview API returns orphaned entry counts
subjects page shows subject list per class
add subject modal has name and teacher assignment fields
assigning a teacher to subject saves correctly
chapter management modal shows chapters with progress
student assignment toggle shows all students and specific options
delete subject triggers removal from list
classes list loads with correct class count
search filters classes by name
class row shows student count
class row shows class teacher name
class row shows subject list
assign class teacher via modal
delete class shows confirmation dialog
class capacity and strength limit displayed
navigate to class detail/dashboard
empty class list shows appropriate message
admin dashboard shows 4 stat cards with correct student and staff counts
recent payments appear in activity feed with student name and amount
attendance snapshot shows present percentage in stat card
announcements appear in activity feed
principal dashboard shows academic overview with student and staff stats
principal sees staff attendance summary with total/present counts
accountant dashboard shows fee collection stats with today and monthly totals
accountant sees monthly collection chart and recent transactions
teacher dashboard shows assigned classes with attendance status
teacher sees pending tasks indicator for unmarked attendance
admin quick action links navigate to correct pages
NPS survey modal appears when API indicates eligible
submit NPS score and feedback shows thank-you message
dashboard shows skeleton loader while data is fetching
dashboard with no data shows empty state messages gracefully
admin dashboard loads with student, staff, and class counts
admin sees recent payments on dashboard
admin dashboard shows attendance snapshot
dashboard with no data shows empty states gracefully
teacher dashboard loads without admin features
teacher can only see assigned class data
accountant dashboard loads with fee-focused data
principal dashboard loads with full school overview

suites.title: Data Tools — Background Jobs & Govt Export

specs.title: jobs page shows import jobs table and system jobs table
job status badges render correctly
job detail modal opens on click
delete job confirms and removes
refresh button reloads job data
govt export page shows 6 export types
selecting export type shows filter options
format selector shows CSV, Excel, PDF buttons
export triggers download with correct parameters
empty academic year filter shows validation error on export
bulk import page loads with 4 import type cards (Students, Staff, Fee Payments, Attendance)
selecting an import type shows upload area
download template button triggers file download for selected type
file upload accepts CSV/XLSX/XLS only — rejects other types with error
drag-and-drop file upload works
dry run toggle is available and defaults to off
upload triggers POST with file and shows progress
import result display shows success/error counts
import history table shows previous imports with status badges (completed, running, queued, failed, rolled_back)
rollback import action changes status to rolled_back
debug login page

PermissionGuard hides elements user lacks permission for
